prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-center integrals were used (no density fitting / RI approximation). The N±1 states (anion and cation) were each doublet (multiplicity 2). Partial charges were obtained via the Mulliken scheme. Geometry was taken from the user-supplied acrolein.xyz without re-optimization.

All three SCFs (neutral, cation, anion) converged. Charge conservation checks passed: sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. No warnings were reported. integrity.trustworthy = true.

Headline result — most electrophilic site: Atom 4 (β-carbon, terminal alkene C), f+ = 0.64232102. Most nucleophilic site: Atom 1 (carbonyl O), f− = 0.39388616.

Full per-atom Fukui indices (f+, f−, f0, dual descriptor):
  Atom 1 O:  f+ = 0.40136419, f− = 0.39388616, f0 = 0.39762517, Δf = 0.0074780351
  Atom 2 C:  f+ = 0.022255105, f− = 0.0059884353, f0 = 0.01412177, Δf = 0.01626667
  Atom 3 C:  f+ = 0.43404673, f− = 0.091403097, f0 = 0.26272491, Δf = 0.34264363
  Atom 4 C:  f+ = 0.64232102, f− = 0.087369815, f0 = 0.36484542, Δf = 0.5549512
  Atom 5 H:  f+ = −0.1572595, f− = 0.085961423, f0 = −0.03564904, Δf = −0.24322092
  Atom 6 H:  f+ = −0.2072029, f− = 0.1856796, f0 = −0.010761648, Δf = −0.39288251
  Atom 7 H:  f+ = −0.062116996, f− = 0.084485809, f0 = 0.011184406, Δf = −0.14660281
  Atom 8 H:  f+ = −0.073407645, f− = 0.065225658, f0 = −0.004090993, Δf = −0.1386333

Output files: acrolein_fukui_dft.json, agent_call_01_plot.png.
CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out acrolein_fukui_dft.json
